channel.title: Docker on Frank Huang
channel.description: Recent content in Docker on Frank Huang

item.title: What docker volumes can do
item.description: I recently have to build a model server project with docker. The reason why I used docker is I want to separate the model server, rest api and the redis service. The python scripts that are used in the model server layer for generating model should be loaded as part of the container since this container is a service for serving model querying which require write locally and test virtually.
